creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Laurent from comment #5)

Yes, if we don't want to try to figure out the cause of the behavior in unclean environments. The "classic way" of installation, e.g. via Portmaster, is currently probably also difficult for other users when using non-default options?

However, I don't currently have an approach to track down the problem myself.
